title: Swede and Purely Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful and comforting tagine dish, perfect for a cozy evening. This American-inspired recipe combines the earthy sweetness of swede with the rich flavors of a traditional tagine.
instructions: Heat the Purely Vegetable Oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the ground cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and chili flakes (if using). Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced swede and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the swede is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs (optional).
